study.title: Soil and Root Fungal communities of Switchgrass and other biofuel grasses in the Michigan and Wisconsin (2018)
study.description: Meta-amplicon sequencing of the soil fungal community of Switchgrass (var. Cave-n-Rock) of the Great Lakes Bioenergy Research Center Marginal Lands Experiment. Samples were collected in 2018.

attributes.Duplicate samples: Sample was resampled do to concern over amplification and sequence quality
